title: Anyone want to play the eva character elimination game

wikitext:
[]: Anyone want to play the eva character elimination game? Post by PurpleandRed » Fri Aug 07, 2015 9:17 pm About last game's answer of Spot the Difference, Asuka is the difference! The rules are to vote 1+ for one character and -1 for another. You can only vote once a day. Rei (15) Shinji (15) Misato (15) Asuka (16) +1 Toji (15) Akagi (15) Kaji (15) Maya (15) Gendo (15) Hikari (15) Toji's sister (14) -1 Kensuke (15) Pen Pen (15) Do you feel that this is all the crap of characters I need?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Aug 07, 2015 9:52 pm Alright, time to step in. While I'm sure you're well meaning, but looking at your posting behavior, by which I mean to point out that you've just signed up, created a bunch of threads, and only posted in those threads, you really ought to give topic creation a rest for a bit and ease yourself into existing discussion, and get a feel for the place before starting any new threads.

Article: Anyone want to play the eva character elimination game
[]: Anyone want to play the eva character elimination game? Post by PurpleandRed » Fri Aug 07, 2015 9:17 pm About last game's answer of Spot the Difference, Asuka is the difference! The rules are to vote 1+ for one character and -1 for another. You can only vote once a day. Rei (15) Shinji (15) Misato (15) Asuka (16) +1 Toji (15) Akagi (15) Kaji (15) Maya (15) Gendo (15) Hikari (15) Toji's sister (14) -1 Kensuke (15) Pen Pen (15) Do you feel that this is all the crap of characters I need?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Aug 07, 2015 9:52 pm Alright, time to step in. While I'm sure you're well meaning, but looking at your posting behavior, by which I mean to point out that you've just signed up, created a bunch of threads, and only posted in those threads, you really ought to give topic creation a rest for a bit and ease yourself into existing discussion, and get a feel for the place before starting any new threads.
